title: GHL OAuth + Core Service Layer
summary: Complete GHL OAuth service with token management, rate limiting, tRPC router, OAuth callback routes, and Settings UI integration

features: OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow with PKCE
Token storage with encryption via credentialVault
Automatic token refresh (5 min before expiry)
Rate limiter (100 req/min per location with token bucket)
Base HTTP client with retry (3 attempts, exponential backoff)

trpcRouter.reason: Original router imported non-existent GHLError class and used wrong service API (constructor-based vs singleton)
procedures: ghl.connect - initiates OAuth flow, returns authorization URL
ghl.status - connection status for all user locations
ghl.disconnect - revoke access and disconnect location
ghl.testConnection - test a connection via API call
ghl.configStatus - check if GHL OAuth env vars are set

oauthRoutes.flow: Exchanges code for tokens, stores in vault, redirects to /settings with success/error params

tables: ghl_connections - tracks connected GHL locations per user

features: Shows GHL config status (not configured warning)
Lists connected locations with status badges
Handles OAuth callback query params from redirect

notes: ghl.service.ts was already comprehensive - no changes needed
Fixed duplicate ghlAutomationRouter import in routers.ts
Created stub routers for pipelines and ghlAutomation (pre-existing missing imports)
GHL_REDIRECT_URI env var should point to /api/ghl/oauth/callback
